_comment: SCA (src/ + xpi/) whose shipped XPI ships a minified background.js, so the review stays in SCA mode (not downgraded to sca-not-required) and the input:build checks run over the src/ build corpus. build-lifecycle-hook flags the package.json postinstall script (warning); committed-build-artifact flags the committed src/dist/addon.zip (error, archive extension only - contents irrelevant). Build-corpus paths are sca-root-relative (no src/ prefix).
